title: Felix Friends
description: Gird your loins for an evening of song, surrealism and smut! Felix & Friends is Brighton's long running cabaret carousel, hosted by a potty-mouthed drag slag and attended by her very peculiar friends. Expect to hear tragic tales of love and lust as Felix delves elbow deep into the annals of her dating history. Prepare to laugh, cry and squirm as her special guests take the stage to do... unspeakable things. Each show promises new performances, unique experiences and an avalanche of rainbow-flavoured nonsense. So take the plunge and come find us, every Friday night at Caravanserai: Junk Poets. Felix Le Freak is a musical comedian, writer and cabaret performer based in the UK. They are the winner of Drag Idol UK, author of Serving Face and the creator of sell-out productions including Fagwartz; Men and Other Problems; and their long-running variety show, Felix & Friends.
content_warnings: Felix & Friends is a chaotic, comedic queer cabaret with its tongue firmly in its cheek

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
